series_metadata.series_title: Applications authorizing the selling of interment rights - Cemeteries
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications or correspondence related to the selling of interment rights.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records maintained in paper form may be imaged and indexed to a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that the paper record is imaged and indexed properly, the paper record shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: For any records maintained in machine readable format, the records shall be maintained for two years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then the machine readable record shall be destroyed. ; Microform: For any records maintained in microform, the records shall be maintained for two years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then the microform shall be destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Recycle
